title: Cute Baby Squirrel Coloring Page

funFacts: The bushy tail of a squirrel is used for balance, as a parachute during jumps, and to communicate with others.
squirrels play a crucial role in forest ecosystems by burying seeds and nuts, which often grow into new trees.
